welcome: Welcome to Synergix, {name}! 🧠🔥 We are the first decentralized collective intelligence on BNB Greenfield. Every contribution you make is immortalized on the blockchain and strengthens a network that grows with you. 🌐 Your knowledge has real value. Share it and be part of something greater. 🚀
welcome_back: Welcome back, {name}! 🔥 What knowledge shall we immortalize today?
contribute_activated: 🎯 Contribution mode activated! Write your idea. It will be recorded on the network forever. 💡 Minimum 20 characters.
status_msg: 📊 Synergix Collective Intelligence 📦 Immortal Contributions: {total_aportes} 🏆 Challenge: {tema_actual} ── Your Impact, {name} ── 📈 Score: {points} pts 🔗 Contributions: {contribuciones} 🔁 Times your contributions were used: {total_uses_count} 🏅 Rank: {rank} ({points_next} pts to next level) 💡 Benefit: {beneficio} ✖️ Multiplier: ×{multiplier} | 📅 Daily limit: {daily_limit} contributions
memory_header: 🧠 Your legacy in the Synergix Immortal Memory:
memory_empty: 🧠 You have no contributions in Immortal Memory yet. Press 🔥 Contribute to leave your mark! 🌐
contribution_received: Received! Your wisdom is being processed and immortalized. 🔗
contribution_success: Thank you, {name}! 🌟 Your contribution is part of the Synergix Immortal Memory 🔗 CID: {cid} Your knowledge lives forever and strengthens the network. 🔥 ⭐ Elite contribution! Score {quality_score}/10 → +{points_gained} points
contribution_success_challenge: Thank you, {name}! 🌟 Your contribution is part of the Synergix Immortal Memory 🔗 CID: {cid} Your knowledge lives forever and strengthens the network. 🔥 ⭐ Elite contribution! Score {quality_score}/10 → +{points_gained} points 🏆 Related to the weekly Challenge! +5 extra points
contribution_rejected: ❌ Contribution not accepted 📊 Score: {quality_score}/10 💬 {reason} Try with deeper and more technical content. 🔥
contribution_too_short: ⚠️ Your contribution is too short. Minimum 20 characters for the Judge to evaluate it.
contribution_duplicate:
♻️ This knowledge already exists in the collective memory with high similarity.
Try contributing something new and different. 🌱
quota_exceeded: ⏳ Daily limit reached Your rank {rank} allows {daily_limit} contributions per day. Come back tomorrow or rank up by contributing more. 🚀
rank_up: 🎉 You ranked up! 🏅 You are now {new_rank} ⚡ New benefits unlocked: {beneficio} Keep contributing to the network! 🔥
top10_header: 🏆 Top 10 — Synergix 👥 Total users on the network: {total_users}
top10_empty: 📊 The leaderboard is still being compiled. Try in a few minutes.
residual_notify:
💰 Your contribution was used by AI to answer another user.
+1 point credited to your account. Your legacy grows! 🌐
error_generic: ⚠️ An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
error_ia: ⚠️ The AI node is starting up. Try in a few seconds.
fsm_cancel: ↩️ Operation cancelled. Back to main menu.
